race.description: Ronald Mcdonald House Southeast Qld Hcp
race.comment: Open race to close out the card. NOVEMBER AIR (4) scored at her most recent appearance, getting home by 1.4 lengths over 1600m at Sunshine Coast Poly as favourite. That continued the good form this campaign, with two wins and three minor placings from six starts. Can measure up again. COOL MUSIC (5) scored at her most recent appearance, getting home by 2.75 lengths over 1350m at Warwick as favourite. Big chance once again. SIR MAURICE (2) has progressed nicely in his last couple of runs. Finished third at Sunshine Coast two starts back then scored by a long neck last time out over 1350m at Ipswich. Has his share of ability and will prove hard to beat in this suitable race. AIMA SUN (12) struggled in the tougher company two back but last time did much better when a 3 length third at this track. Rates highly on best form and shouldn't be underestimated.
